mapper.update: UPDATE exam_import_job SET storage_path = #{storagePath}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_import_job WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId} AND delete_flag = '1' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_import_job ( job_name, bank_name, source_mode, storage_path, status, uploaded_file_count, progress_message, delete_flag ) VALUES ( #{jobName}, #{batchName}, #{sourceMode}, NULL, 'pending', #{uploadedFileCount}, #{progressMessage}, '1' )
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'running', start_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE exam_import_job SET resolved_file_count = #{resolvedFileCount}, manifest_count = #{bundleCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, imported_paper_count = #{bundleCount}, imported_asset_count = #{importedAssetCount}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'completed', resolved_file_count = #{resolvedFileCount}, manifest_count = #{bundleCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, imported_paper_count = #{bundleCount}, imported_asset_count = #{importedAssetCount}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, result_json = #{resultJson}, finish_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE exam_import_job SET status = 'failed', error_message = #{errorMessage}, progress_message = #{progressMessage}, finish_time = COALESCE(finish_time, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE exam_import_job_id = #{jobId}
